name: clearpath-lending
description: A consumer lending team from application intake to fund disbursement.

resources.name: Lending Manager
resources.description: Owns the lending process end to end, setting credit policy and resolving escalations across the team.

resources.name: Loan Officer
resources.description: Works directly with borrowers from initial application through to final funding, serving as the primary point of contact.

resources.name: Underwriter
resources.description: Assesses credit risk and borrower eligibility, issuing approval recommendations based on policy and financials.

resources.name: Closing Specialist
resources.description: Executes closing documentation and disburses approved funds, ensuring regulatory compliance at every step.

resources.name: Loan Origination
resources.description: End-to-end origination workflow from borrower application to fund disbursement.

resources.name: Intake Application
resources.description: Collect and verify borrower information, open a loan file, and confirm application completeness.

resources.name: Collect Documents
resources.description: Gather income verification, tax returns, and borrower ID to complete the application file.

resources.name: Applicant Communication
resources.description: Keep borrowers informed of status, outstanding conditions, and next steps throughout the process.

resources.name: Run Credit Check
resources.description: Pull the borrower's credit report and score to establish a baseline for the underwriting review.

resources.name: Underwrite Loan
resources.description: Review the borrower's credit profile, debt-to-income ratio, and collateral against current lending policy.

resources.name: Risk Assessment
resources.description: Evaluate collateral value, loan-to-value ratio, and market risk to complete the credit recommendation.

resources.name: Exception Review
resources.description: Adjudicate loan applications that fall outside standard credit policy parameters, documenting rationale.

resources.name: Pipeline Management
resources.description: Monitor active loan pipeline for SLA adherence, identify bottlenecks, and report on team throughput.

resources.name: Compliance Sign-off
resources.description: Verify that each approved loan meets applicable regulatory and audit requirements before closing.

resources.name: Prepare Closing Documents
resources.description: Assemble and review all required closing documents, ensuring accuracy before the signing appointment.

resources.name: Close Loan
resources.description: Prepare and execute closing documents, confirm borrower signatures, and satisfy outstanding conditions.

resources.name: Disburse Funds
resources.description: Release approved funds to the borrower's designated account and update loan status to active.
